# Paperclip Hub — full plugin index

> Generated from the registry. The canonical structured form is /plugins.json.

Generated: 2026-06-02T07:15:38.336Z
Total plugins: 14

Each entry below lists: name, npm package, category, install command, weekly downloads, version, capabilities, and source.

---

## E2B Sandbox Provider

First-party sandbox provider plugin that provisions E2B cloud sandboxes as Paperclip execution environments.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/plugin-e2b
- npm: @paperclipai/plugin-e2b (v2026.529.0)
- Category: tools
- Weekly downloads: 2415
- Source: https://github.com/paperclipai/paperclip
- Capabilities: environment.drivers.register
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install @paperclipai/plugin-e2b

## Hindsight Memory

Persistent long-term memory for Paperclip agents. Automatically recalls relevant context before each run and retains agent output after — so every agent gets smarter over time.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/hindsight-paperclip
- npm: @vectorize-io/hindsight-paperclip (v0.2.3)
- Category: memory
- Weekly downloads: 266
- Source: https://github.com/vectorize-io/hindsight
- Capabilities: events.subscribe, agent.tools.register, plugin.state.read, plugin.state.write, http.outbound, secrets.read-ref, agents.read, issues.read, issue.comments.read
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install @vectorize-io/hindsight-paperclip

## Telegram Bot

Bidirectional Telegram integration: push notifications, bot commands, escalation to humans, multi-agent sessions (native + ACP), media pipeline with transcription, custom workflow commands, and proactive suggestion watches.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/paperclip-plugin-telegram
- npm: paperclip-plugin-telegram (v0.6.1)
- Category: integration
- Weekly downloads: 191
- Source: https://github.com/mvanhorn/paperclip-plugin-telegram
- Capabilities: companies.read, projects.read, issues.read, issues.create, issues.update, issue.comments.read, issue.comments.create, agents.read, agents.invoke, agent.sessions.create, agent.sessions.list, agent.sessions.send, agent.sessions.close, agent.tools.register, events.subscribe, events.emit, plugin.state.read, plugin.state.write, http.outbound, secrets.read-ref, activity.log.write, metrics.write, jobs.schedule, instance.settings.register, ui.page.register
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install paperclip-plugin-telegram

## Slack Chat OS

Full Chat OS for Slack: escalation, multi-agent sessions, media pipeline, custom commands, and proactive suggestions. Push Paperclip notifications, receive slash commands, and manage agent workflows.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/paperclip-plugin-slack
- npm: paperclip-plugin-slack (v2.0.8)
- Category: integration
- Weekly downloads: 185
- Source: https://github.com/mvanhorn/paperclip-plugin-slack
- Capabilities: companies.read, issues.read, issues.create, agents.read, agent.sessions.create, agent.sessions.send, agent.sessions.close, agents.invoke, events.subscribe, events.emit, plugin.state.read, plugin.state.write, http.outbound, secrets.read-ref, webhooks.receive, instance.settings.register, activity.log.write, metrics.write, jobs.schedule, agent.tools.register
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install paperclip-plugin-slack

## Discord Bot

Bidirectional Discord integration: push notifications on agent events, receive slash commands, gather community intelligence, multi-agent sessions, media pipeline, custom commands, and proactive suggestions.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/paperclip-plugin-discord
- npm: paperclip-plugin-discord (v0.9.1)
- Category: integration
- Weekly downloads: 128
- Source: https://github.com/mvanhorn/paperclip-plugin-discord

- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install paperclip-plugin-discord

## File Navigator

Browse projects with real names and open them directly in your external filebrowser.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/paperclip-plugin-navigator

- Category: tools
- Weekly downloads: 47

- Capabilities: projects.read, project.workspaces.read, companies.read, ui.page.register, ui.sidebar.register, http.outbound
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install paperclip-plugin-navigator

## Kubernetes Sandbox Provider

Provisions a long-lived Kubernetes pod per environment lease and routes adapter command execution through the K8s exec API.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/paperclip-plugin-k8s
- npm: @farhoodlabs/paperclip-plugin-k8s (v0.3.7)
- Category: tools
- Weekly downloads: 42
- Capabilities: environment.drivers.register, instance.settings.register
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install @farhoodlabs/paperclip-plugin-k8s

## Agent Analytics Live

Paperclip plugin for viewing live Agent Analytics signals inside a company workspace.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/paperclip-live-analytics-plugin
- npm: @agent-analytics/paperclip-live-analytics-plugin (v0.1.11)
- Category: observability
- Weekly downloads: 35
- Source: https://github.com/Agent-Analytics/paperclip-live-analytics-plugin
- Capabilities: http.outbound, plugin.state.read, plugin.state.write, companies.read, projects.read, ui.page.register, ui.dashboardWidget.register, ui.sidebar.register, instance.settings.register
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install @agent-analytics/paperclip-live-analytics-plugin

## Linear

Two-way sync between Paperclip projects and a Linear workspace. Pick which Paperclip project links to which Linear project; new Paperclip issues push to the linked Linear project, Linear issues that carry a configured label are imported back so agents can pick them up.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/paperclip-plugin-linear
- npm: @oldharlem/paperclip-plugin-linear (v0.7.0)
- Category: integration
- Weekly downloads: 12
- Source: https://github.com/Oldharlem/paperclip-linear-plugin
- Capabilities: companies.read, projects.read, issues.read, issues.create, issues.update, issues.wakeup, issue.comments.read, issue.comments.create, issue.documents.read, activity.log.write, plugin.state.read, plugin.state.write, events.subscribe, events.emit, jobs.schedule, webhooks.receive, http.outbound, secrets.read-ref, agent.tools.register, instance.settings.register, ui.page.register, ui.dashboardWidget.register, ui.detailTab.register, ui.sidebar.register
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install @oldharlem/paperclip-plugin-linear

## Agent Usage Tracker

Monitors AI provider usage quotas (Claude, etc.) and exposes real-time usage data to agents and the dashboard so they can make smart decisions based on remaining capacity.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/paperclip-plugin-agent-usage
- npm: paperclip-plugin-agent-usage (v0.1.3)
- Category: observability
- Weekly downloads: 11
- Source: https://github.com/lacymorrow/paperclip-plugin-agent-usage
- Capabilities: companies.read, plugin.state.read, plugin.state.write, events.subscribe, events.emit, jobs.schedule, http.outbound, metrics.write, agent.tools.register, ui.dashboardWidget.register, ui.page.register, instance.settings.register
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install paperclip-plugin-agent-usage

## DriftWatch

Audit agent instructions in read-only mode. Detect drift, overlap, and handoff mismatches across your agent system.

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/paperclip-plugin-driftwatch
- npm: @octofloworg/paperclip-plugin-driftwatch (v0.1.10)
- Category: observability
- Weekly downloads: 9
- Capabilities: agents.read, http.outbound, secrets.read-ref, ui.page.register
- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install @octofloworg/paperclip-plugin-driftwatch

## Workflow Studio

Visual workflow editor that publishes Paperclip Company Skills

- URL: https://cliphub.fyi/plugins/paperclip-plugin-workflow-studio
- npm: @vlbog/paperclip-plugin-workflow-studio (v0.1.3)
- Category: tools
- Weekly downloads: 9
- Source: https://github.com/Vladick-Pick/paperclip-plugin-workflow-studio

- Install: npx paperclipai@latest plugin install @vlbog/paperclip-plugin-workflow-studio
